home.title_desc: Discover our sovereign solutions. Browse, communicate, and analyze your data with the guarantee of absolute privacy.

privacy.title: Respectful of privacy
privacy.description: No ads, no trackers, no data reselling. Your data remains yours, not ours. Your data remains encrypted at all times, and only you hold the keys.

oss.title: Transparent source code
oss.description: The code for all our software is open, free, and free to use. You can download, modify, and use it without paying any royalties.

selfhost.title: Self-hosted services
selfhost.description: If you don't want to trust us, you can host our services yourself. Without losing a single feature and while remaining connected to other instances.

sovereign.title: Digital sovereign
sovereign.description: You are not dependent on any service provider: your usage, your choices, and your infrastructure belong entirely to you. There is no large company behind us.

turms.title: Gravitalia Turms
turms.desc: Communicate securely without a central server. Every message is end-to-end encrypted and goes directly from your device to your contact's. The infrastructure disappears, privacy remains.

news.title: Gravitalia News
news.desc: A clear view of the world. Our engine compiles news without filter bubbles or addictive suggestion algorithms. Read what really matters, from verified sources, without advertising profiling.

galadril.title: Gravitalia Galadril
galadril.desc: Data analysis and intelligence platform. Visualize complex connections, extract strategic insights, and anticipate trends with our cognitive engines.

ai.desc: Analytical intelligence designed to respect your secrets. Explore complex data and extract insights without compromising security.

cognitive.title: Sovereign cognitive engine
cognitive.desc: Your data never leaves your environment. Analysis is done locally or on encrypted trusted nodes.

protection.title: Absolute Protection
protection.desc: Unlike commercial AIs, Galadril doesn't train on your queries. What is analyzed belongs to you.

flag.desc: Gravitalia is subject to European data protection laws. No data resale, no backdoors, just sovereign technology.
